name: scarf-breathe
prompt: Close-up of young woman with deep red wavy hair pressing a pale blue silk scarf against her face. Wearing ONLY a white shirt hanging open unbuttoned, no blazer, no jacket. Eyes half-closed, expression intense and longing. Cold silk fabric against her mouth and nose. Frost traces visible on scarf melting slightly. Warm amber side lighting. Dark background with heat shimmer. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, bold expressions, mature shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, cel shading

dialogue.speaker: Senna
dialogue.text: That clean frost-and-nothing scent I've been chasing for two years.

bubble: Internal thought from Senna, face fills frame CENTER, place thought bubble TOP as internal monologue

name: tracing-photo
prompt: Extreme close-up on feminine fingertips tracing along the collarbones of a girl in a glossy photograph. The photo shows a silver-haired girl at a podium, composed expression. Heat marks visible where fingertips touch the glossy surface. Warm amber lighting on hands. Slow possessive gesture. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, bold expressions, mature shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, cel shading

name: collar-memory
prompt: Close-up memory flash panel. A feminine thumb pressing against a high uniform collar at the neck, finding the pulse point through fabric. Morning light, warm golden tones. Soft dreamlike edges. Intimate close gesture. Pale skin at the collar. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, bold expressions, mature shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, cel shading
